name: @elizaos/plugin-pty
description: Interactive PTY terminal service for elizaOS — registers PTY_SERVICE so the app's web terminal can drive a real interactive CLI (eliza-code on Eliza Cloud/cerebras)
author: elizaOS

PTY_INTERACTIVE_ENABLED.description: Enable interactive PTY session spawning (real CLI in the web terminal). Off on store builds.

PTY_ALLOWED_DIRECTORY.description: Directory interactive PTY sessions are restricted to (cwd + workspace root). Defaults to the process cwd.

ELIZA_CODE_BIN.description: Absolute path to the interactive eliza-code binary (dist/index.js). Auto-resolved from the workspace when unset.

PTY_VENDOR_CLI_ENABLED.description: Enable the experimental vendor-CLI tier (interactive claude/codex on the user's own subscription). Default off; store builds always reject.

PTY_CLAUDE_BIN.description: Absolute path to the claude CLI launcher. Resolved from PATH when unset.

PTY_CODEX_BIN.description: Absolute path to the codex CLI launcher. Resolved from PATH when unset.

platformDetails.node: Default export (Node.js) — requires a real PTY, not available on store builds
